+package assessment.manager.services.implementations;%0D%0A%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.data.models.Assessment;%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.data.repositories.AssessmentRepo;%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.data.repositories.OptionRepo;%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.data.repositories.QuestionRepo;%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.dtos.requests.CreateAssessmentRequest;%0D%0Aimport assessment.manager.dtos.responses.AssessmentResponse;%0D%0Aimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;%0D%0Aimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;%0D%0Aimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;%0D%0Aimport org.mockito.InjectMocks;%0D%0Aimport org.mockito.Mock;%0D%0Aimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;%0D%0A%0D%0Aimport java.time.LocalDateTime;%0D%0Aimport java.util.ArrayList;%0D%0A%0D%0Aimport static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.*;%0D%0Aimport static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;%0D%0Aimport static org.mockito.Mockito.*;%0D%0A%0D%0A@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)%0D%0Aclass AssessmentServiceImplTest %7B%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Mock%0D%0A    private AssessmentRepo assessmentRepo;%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Mock%0D%0A    private QuestionRepo questionRepo;%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Mock%0D%0A    private OptionRepo optionRepo;%0D%0A%0D%0A    @InjectMocks%0D%0A    private AssessmentServiceImpl assessmentService;%0D%0A%0D%0A    private CreateAssessmentRequest validRequest;%0D%0A    private Assessment savedAssessment;%0D%0A%0D%0A    @BeforeEach%0D%0A    void setUp() %7B%0D%0A        validRequest = new CreateAssessmentRequest(%0D%0A                %22creator123%22,%0D%0A                %22Test Assessment%22,%0D%0A                %22This is a test assessment%22,%0D%0A                3600,%0D%0A                true,%0D%0A                false%0D%0A        );%0D%0A%0D%0A        savedAssessment = Assessment.builder()%0D%0A                .id(%22assessment123%22)%0D%0A                .creatorId(%22creator123%22)%0D%0A                .title(%22Test Assessment%22)%0D%0A                .description(%22This is a test assessment%22)%0D%0A                .questionIds(new ArrayList%3C%3E())%0D%0A                .timerDuration(3600)%0D%0A                .isOptionsRandomize(true)%0D%0A                .isQuestionsRandomize(false)%0D%0A                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .build();%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_ValidRequest_ShouldReturnAssessmentResponse() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(savedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(validRequest);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22assessment123%22, response.getId());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22creator123%22, response.getCreatorId());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22Test Assessment%22, response.getTitle());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22This is a test assessment%22, response.getDescription());%0D%0A        assertEquals(3600, response.getTimerDuration());%0D%0A        assertTrue(response.isOptionsRandomized());%0D%0A        assertFalse(response.isQuestionsRandomized());%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response.getCreatedAt());%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response.getUpdatedAt());%0D%0A        assertTrue(response.getQuestions().isEmpty());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_NullRequest_ShouldThrowException() %7B%0D%0A        // Act & Assert%0D%0A        assertThrows(NullPointerException.class, () -%3E %7B%0D%0A            assessmentService.createAssessment(null);%0D%0A        %7D);%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, never()).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_NullCreatorId_ShouldCreateAssessmentWithNullCreatorId() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        CreateAssessmentRequest requestWithNullCreatorId = new CreateAssessmentRequest(%0D%0A                null,%0D%0A                %22Test Assessment%22,%0D%0A                %22This is a test assessment%22,%0D%0A                3600,%0D%0A                true,%0D%0A                false%0D%0A        );%0D%0A%0D%0A        Assessment expectedAssessment = Assessment.builder()%0D%0A                .id(%22assessment123%22)%0D%0A                .creatorId(null)%0D%0A                .title(%22Test Assessment%22)%0D%0A                .description(%22This is a test assessment%22)%0D%0A                .questionIds(new ArrayList%3C%3E())%0D%0A                .timerDuration(3600)%0D%0A                .isOptionsRandomize(true)%0D%0A                .isQuestionsRandomize(false)%0D%0A                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .build();%0D%0A%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(expectedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(requestWithNullCreatorId);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertNull(response.getCreatorId());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22Test Assessment%22, response.getTitle());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_EmptyTitle_ShouldCreateAssessmentWithEmptyTitle() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        CreateAssessmentRequest requestWithEmptyTitle = new CreateAssessmentRequest(%0D%0A                %22creator123%22,%0D%0A                %22%22,%0D%0A                %22This is a test assessment%22,%0D%0A                3600,%0D%0A                true,%0D%0A                false%0D%0A        );%0D%0A%0D%0A        Assessment expectedAssessment = Assessment.builder()%0D%0A                .id(%22assessment123%22)%0D%0A                .creatorId(%22creator123%22)%0D%0A                .title(%22%22)%0D%0A                .description(%22This is a test assessment%22)%0D%0A                .questionIds(new ArrayList%3C%3E())%0D%0A                .timerDuration(3600)%0D%0A                .isOptionsRandomize(true)%0D%0A                .isQuestionsRandomize(false)%0D%0A                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .build();%0D%0A%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(expectedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(requestWithEmptyTitle);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22%22, response.getTitle());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22creator123%22, response.getCreatorId());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_ZeroTimerDuration_ShouldCreateAssessmentWithZeroTimer() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        CreateAssessmentRequest requestWithZeroTimer = new CreateAssessmentRequest(%0D%0A                %22creator123%22,%0D%0A                %22Test Assessment%22,%0D%0A                %22This is a test assessment%22,%0D%0A                0,%0D%0A                true,%0D%0A                false%0D%0A        );%0D%0A%0D%0A        Assessment expectedAssessment = Assessment.builder()%0D%0A                .id(%22assessment123%22)%0D%0A                .creatorId(%22creator123%22)%0D%0A                .title(%22Test Assessment%22)%0D%0A                .description(%22This is a test assessment%22)%0D%0A                .questionIds(new ArrayList%3C%3E())%0D%0A                .timerDuration(0)%0D%0A                .isOptionsRandomize(true)%0D%0A                .isQuestionsRandomize(false)%0D%0A                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .build();%0D%0A%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(expectedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(requestWithZeroTimer);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertEquals(0, response.getTimerDuration());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22Test Assessment%22, response.getTitle());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_NegativeTimerDuration_ShouldCreateAssessmentWithNegativeTimer() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        CreateAssessmentRequest requestWithNegativeTimer = new CreateAssessmentRequest(%0D%0A                %22creator123%22,%0D%0A                %22Test Assessment%22,%0D%0A                %22This is a test assessment%22,%0D%0A                -100,%0D%0A                true,%0D%0A                false%0D%0A        );%0D%0A%0D%0A        Assessment expectedAssessment = Assessment.builder()%0D%0A                .id(%22assessment123%22)%0D%0A                .creatorId(%22creator123%22)%0D%0A                .title(%22Test Assessment%22)%0D%0A                .description(%22This is a test assessment%22)%0D%0A                .questionIds(new ArrayList%3C%3E())%0D%0A                .timerDuration(-100)%0D%0A                .isOptionsRandomize(true)%0D%0A                .isQuestionsRandomize(false)%0D%0A                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())%0D%0A                .build();%0D%0A%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(expectedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(requestWithNegativeTimer);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertEquals(-100, response.getTimerDuration());%0D%0A        assertEquals(%22Test Assessment%22, response.getTitle());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    @Test%0D%0A    void createAssessment_ValidRequest_ShouldVerifyAssessmentResponseConversion() %7B%0D%0A        // Arrange%0D%0A        when(assessmentRepo.save(any(Assessment.class))).thenReturn(savedAssessment);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Act%0D%0A        AssessmentResponse response = assessmentService.createAssessment(validRequest);%0D%0A%0D%0A        // Assert%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response);%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.getId(), response.getId());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.getCreatorId(), response.getCreatorId());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.getTitle(), response.getTitle());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.getDescription(), response.getDescription());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.getTimerDuration(), response.getTimerDuration());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.isOptionsRandomize(), response.isOptionsRandomized());%0D%0A        assertEquals(savedAssessment.isQuestionsRandomize(), response.isQuestionsRandomized());%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response.getCreatedAt());%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response.getUpdatedAt());%0D%0A        assertNotNull(response.getQuestions());%0D%0A        assertTrue(response.getQuestions().isEmpty());%0D%0A%0D%0A        verify(assessmentRepo, times(1)).save(any(Assessment.class));%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%7D
